mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_favorite ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_favorite (document_id, user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{documentId}, #{userId}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_favorite SET document_id = #{documentId}, user_id = #{userId} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kb_favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM kb_favorite WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM kb_favorite WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
